attr.title: Just a To the Moon Series Beach Episode
attr.desc: The Beach Episode™ of To the Moon, Finding Paradise, and Impostor Factory. But something's off.
attr.inst: Copy the entire contents of your Steam install (`steamapps/common/To the Moon Beachsode/To the Moon Beachsode/`) into the `to_the_moon_beachsode` folder. Required files: Game.rgssad, Game.ini, Audio/, Fonts/, preload/.
